description.ru: Client, Local Server, Pulse Cloud и release infrastructure.
description.en: Client, Local Server, Pulse Cloud and release infrastructure.

blocks.value:
flowchart LR
  P[Windows / PWA / Android] --> C[React + Vite Client]
  C --> T[Trust Core + MLS]
  T <--> S[Local Server API v3/v4 + Socket.IO]
  S --> D[(SQLite schema 8)]
  S <--> PULSE[Pulse Cloud]
  PULSE --> PAY[Provider]
  C --> R[GitHub Releases]

text.ru: Client хранит private device/MLS state; Local Server управляет local identity, доступом, порядком и ciphertext; Pulse Cloud отвечает за Cloud Identity, ledger и production entitlements.
text.en: The Client stores private device/MLS state; Local Server controls local identity, access, ordering and ciphertext; Pulse Cloud owns Cloud Identity, ledger and production entitlements.

ru: Client нормализует URL и требует HTTPS вне development.
Health probe получает Server ID, compatibility и fingerprint.
Пользователь сверяет fingerprint по доверенному каналу.
Server создаёт HttpOnly session и CSRF token.
Client загружает bootstrap до Trust enrollment.
Realtime auth включает active Trust deviceId.
en: The Client normalizes the URL and requires HTTPS outside development.
A health probe obtains Server ID, compatibility and fingerprint.
The user verifies the fingerprint over a trusted channel.
The Server creates an HttpOnly session and CSRF token.
The Client loads bootstrap before Trust enrollment.
Realtime authentication includes the active Trust deviceId.

description.ru: Какая подсистема является источником истины для каждой категории данных.
description.en: Which subsystem is authoritative for each data category.

rows.ru: UI, offline state, device keys, MLS encryption/decryption
rows.en: UI, offline state, device keys, MLS encryption/decryption

rows.ru: Accounts, sessions, rooms, roles, bans, policies, ordering, audit
rows.en: Accounts, sessions, rooms, roles, bans, policies, ordering, audit

rows.ru: Private MLS state и secure plaintext
rows.en: Private MLS state and secure plaintext

rows.ru: Cloud Identity, MFA, billing, ledger, entitlements
rows.en: Cloud Identity, MFA, billing, ledger, entitlements

rows.ru: Tag, source revision, signing, checksums, SBOM
rows.en: Tag, source revision, signing, checksums, SBOM

description.ru: SQLite persistence, migrations и Trust additions.
description.en: SQLite persistence, migrations and Trust additions.

ru: Schema 7: accounts, rooms, messages, media, audit, automations и Pulse integration state.
Schema 8: Trust challenges, devices, KeyPackages, MLS groups/members, Welcome queue, commits, replay cache, secure attachments и persistent rate-limit state.
en: Schema 7: accounts, rooms, messages, media, audit, automations and Pulse integration state.
Schema 8: Trust challenges, devices, KeyPackages, MLS groups/members, Welcome queue, commits, replay cache, secure attachments and persistent rate-limit state.

ru: WAL checkpoint и verified pre-migration backup.
en: WAL checkpoint and verified pre-migration backup.

text.ru: Schema 8 нельзя безопасно открыть schema 7 binary. Rollback выполняется восстановлением проверенного backup.
text.en: A schema 8 database must not be opened by a schema 7 binary. Rollback restores a verified backup.

description.ru: Socket.IO delivery, IndexedDB cache, durable outbox и recovery.
description.en: Socket.IO delivery, IndexedDB cache, durable outbox and recovery.

text.ru: Socket delivery проверяет active session, membership, ban/restriction и, для secure conversation, verified device/group membership. Потерявший доступ пользователь удаляется из room subscriptions и не получает новые события.
text.en: Socket delivery checks active session, membership, bans/restrictions and, for secure conversations, verified device/group membership. A user who loses access is removed from room subscriptions and receives no new events.

ru: IndexedDB cache хранит application shell и разрешённое local state.
Durable outbox использует idempotency и ordering.
Reconnect выполняет delta sync и классифицирует conflicts.
Financial actions не считаются успешными из offline outbox без Cloud confirmation.
en: IndexedDB cache stores the application shell and permitted local state.
The durable outbox uses idempotency and ordering.
Reconnect performs delta sync and classifies conflicts.
Financial actions are never considered successful from the offline outbox without Cloud confirmation.
